name: Queen
description: Queen is the in-game name of a character, who was not mentioned in the original light novel, who is said to be the strongest member of 『Night Opera』, a guild of 1,200 players. She appears in the first episode of the anime. She finds 『　　』 to be cool and smart since they were able to dodge her attacks despite her using dishonest means (cheating) to cast consecutive spells.
